message.content:
@startuml
actor Actor
participant "WizardAction" as WizardAction #D3D8E9#051627;
note right of WizardAction : Extention loading and integration\nwith main UI can be found on Example Extention diagrams
Actor ->> WizardAction: starts use case 
create participant frame as "frame : WizardFrame"#D3D8E9#051627;;
WizardAction->>+frame:new(UIController)
activate frame  
create controller  as "controller : WizardController"#D3D8E9#051627;;
frame->>+controller:new(UIController)
activate controller   
loop getFunctions()    
    activate Language     
        controller->Language:getInstance()        
         loop displayInformation()             
             selfMessage loadTextFields():loadTextFields();         
          end       
     deactivate Language      
end 

deactivate controller  

group Select Function
    
   note over Controller,UIControler:Get Expression from user input
   
      rect rgb(240, 240, 240)          
            alt expression is null               
                UIControler-->self:createErrorDialog("No function selected")            
           else                
               create cellObject              
              par Get Cell Object                  
                  UIControler->CellFactory:getActiveCell(cellId);                 
                 opt if object was deleted                     
                     CellFactory-->>cellObject:return NULL                   
                    end                    
                   group Compile Formula                        
                       compileFormula(expression,getParameters());                      
                      end                       
                        return result(resultType,resultValue);                         
                         destroy cellObject                          
                          end                            
                            end                              
                              end                               
                                @enduml
